entities.name: Phase 1: Calibration
entities.context: First phase of training plan spanning Weeks 1 & 2, focused on waking up the nervous system and establishing habit

entities.name: RPE
entities.context: Rate of Perceived Exertion, used to gauge workout intensity on a scale of 1-10

entities.name: Zone 1
entities.context: Low-intensity heart rate zone used for Sunday walking sessions

entities.name: No Soreness Rule
entities.context: Core principle: if sore the next day, intensity was too high. Governs all Phase 1 training

entities.name: Upper Body Workout
entities.context: Tuesday session: pick 5 exercises, 1 set only, RPE 5/10

entities.name: Mobility / Stretching
entities.context: Thursday session: 15 minutes of relaxing mobility work

entities.name: Lower Body Workout
entities.context: Saturday session: pick 5 exercises, 1 set only, RPE 5/10

entities.name: V
entities.context: Recipient of the training plan, in early re-entry phase of fitness

relationships.context: The no-soreness rule is the governing constraint of the entire calibration phase
Tuesday upper body session is part of the Phase 1 weekly schedule
Thursday mobility session is part of the Phase 1 weekly schedule
Saturday lower body session is part of the Phase 1 weekly schedule
Sunday walk is part of the Phase 1 weekly schedule
Upper body workout capped at RPE 5/10 (very easy)
Lower body workout capped at RPE 5/10 (very easy)
Walking session performed at Zone 1 intensity
V is following this calibration phase as part of a return-to-fitness program
